project.name: SylphxAI Configs
project.summary: Shared TypeScript and Biome configuration package monorepo for SylphxAI projects, published through small versioned package exports.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/tsconfig package
surfaces.description: Published TypeScript configuration package identity, exports, and metadata.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/biome-config package
surfaces.description: Published Biome configuration package identity, exports, and metadata.

surfaces.name: Public README
surfaces.description: Public repository overview and package usage entry point.

surfaces.name: Project control plane
surfaces.description: Human project identity, lifecycle, boundary, delivery, and adoption entry point.

surfaces.name: CI
surfaces.description: ADR-29 admission,, lint, tests, and postsubmit proof.

surfaces.name: Release
surfaces.description: Central release workflow hook for config package publication from main.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: lint
commands.purpose: Run Biome checks over shared config packages and docs.

commands.name: test
commands.purpose: Run lightweight shared package contract tests.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral project.manifest retained as optional metadata. GroundAtlas package dogfood retired (Control Plane ADR-0014). .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog.
